entries.source: Information is everywhere. Understanding is still unevenly distributed.
entries.value: Tá faisnéis i ngach áit. Tá tuiscint fós scaipthe go míchothrom.

entries.source: Inside the live mode, the core job is: {value1}. That focus keeps the session pointed at progress instead of another long explanation.
entries.value: Laistigh den mhód beo, is é an croíphost: {value1}. Coinníonn an fócas sin an seisiún dírithe ar dhul chun cinn seachas ar mhíniú fada eile.

entries.source: Inside the live mode, the goal is to turn a vague question into a focused session with examples, checks, and a useful next action.
entries.value: Laistigh den mhód beo, is é an sprioc ceist dhoiléir a iompú ina seisiún dírithe le samplaí, seiceálacha, agus chéad ghníomh úsáideach eile.

entries.value: Scrúdaigh foinsí, mapaigh coincheapa, aimsigh míthuiscintí, agus tiontaigh taighde ina argóint níos soiléire.

entries.source: inspir began as quizzes and student communities, grew through schools and events, and now uses AI to make one-to-one learning more accessible.
entries.value: Thosaigh inspir mar thráthanna ceist agus pobail mac léinn, d’fhás sé trí scoileanna agus imeachtaí, agus úsáideann sé IS anois chun foghlaim duine le duine a dhéanamh níos inrochtana.

entries.source: inspir began in 2013 as a public quiz and learning community, grew through schools and student networks, and later developed AI learning infrastructure and public AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: Thosaigh inspir in 2013 mar phobal poiblí tráthanna ceiste agus foghlama, d’fhás sé trí scoileanna agus líonraí daltaí, agus d’fhorbair sé bonneagar foghlama IS agus taithí teagaisc IS phoiblí ina dhiaidh sin.

entries.source: inspir comparison pages should be useful without pretending another platform is static. Check official sources for the latest product details.
entries.value: Ba chóir do leathanaigh comparáide inspir a bheith úsáideach gan ligean air go bhfuil ardán eile statach. Seiceáil foinsí oifigiúla le haghaidh na sonraí táirge is déanaí.

entries.source: inspir crawler and indexing policy
entries.value: polasaí crawler agus innéacsaithe inspir

entries.source: inspir exists for the moment a learner wants to understand something and needs a patient place to begin. The film introduces the product as a free public learning companion for curiosity, practice, and access.
entries.value: Tá inspir ann don nóiméad a bhíonn foghlaimeoir ag iarraidh rud éigin a thuiscint agus a bhfuil áit fhoighneach de dhíth air le tosú. Cuireann an scannán an táirge i láthair mar chompánach foghlama poiblí saor in aisce don fhiosracht, don chleachtadh, agus don rochtain.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: Tá inspir ann chun foghlaim a dhéanamh inrochtana, tarraingteach, taitneamhach, agus úsáideach d’aon duine a bhfuil fiosracht aige trí uirlisí foghlama IS poiblí saor in aisce agus spásanna foghlama réidh don scoil.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity, whether they are a student, parent, teacher, or self-taught learner.
entries.value: Tá inspir ann chun foghlaim a dhéanamh inrochtana, tarraingteach, taitneamhach, agus úsáideach d’aon duine a bhfuil fiosracht aige, cibé acu dalta, tuismitheoir, múinteoir, nó foghlaimeoir féin-mhúinte é.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform shaped by more than a decade of quizzes, extracurricular learning, school networks, and applied AI experimentation.
entries.value: Is ardán foghlama IS saor in aisce é inspir a mhúnlaigh breis agus deich mbliana de thráthanna ceiste, foghlaim seach-churaclaim, líonraí scoile, agus turgnamh IS feidhmeach.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: Is ardán foghlama IS saor in aisce é inspir le modhanna poiblí d’aíonna le haghaidh mínithe, teagasc Sócraiteach, cóitseáil obair bhaile, tráthanna ceiste, spléachchártaí, díospóireacht, rólghlacadh, aiseolas scríbhneoireachta, agus pleanáil staidéir.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: Is ardán foghlama IS saor in aisce é inspir le modhanna poiblí d’aíonna le haghaidh mínithe, teagasc Sócraiteach, cóitseáil obair bhaile, tráthanna ceiste, spléachchártaí, díospóireacht, aiseolas scríbhneoireachta, cabhair códaithe, agus pleanáil staidéir.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI tutor and learning companion for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, role-play, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: Is teagascóir IS agus compánach foghlama saor in aisce é inspir le haghaidh mínithe, teagasc Sócraiteach, cóitseáil obair bhaile, tráthanna ceiste, spléachchártaí, díospóireacht, rólghlacadh, aiseolas scríbhneoireachta, cabhair códaithe, agus pleanáil staidéir.

entries.source: inspir is being built in public.
entries.value: Tá inspir á thógáil go poiblí.

entries.source: inspir is built around public guest AI modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, math steps, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and study planning.
entries.value: Tá inspir tógtha timpeall ar mhodhanna poiblí IS d’aíonna: ceisteanna Sócraiteacha, leideanna obair bhaile, céimeanna matamaitice, aiseolas scríbhneoireachta, tráthanna ceiste, spléachchártaí, agus pleanáil staidéir.

entries.source: inspir is designed around reasoning, practice, recall, and explanation instead of handing learners finished work.
entries.value: Tá inspir deartha timpeall ar réasúnaíocht, cleachtadh, cuimhne, agus míniú seachas obair chríochnaithe a thabhairt d’fhoghlaimeoirí.

entries.source: inspir is for students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners who need focused AI learning modes for explanations, questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: Tá inspir ann do dhaltaí, tuismitheoirí, múinteoirí, agus foghlaimeoirí féin-mhúinte a bhfuil modhanna foghlama IS dírithe de dhíth orthu le haghaidh mínithe, ceisteanna, leideanna, tráthanna ceiste, spléachchártaí, aiseolas, agus pleanáil staidéir.

entries.source: inspir is organized around hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review, and explanation instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: Tá inspir eagraithe timpeall ar leideanna, ceisteanna, tráthanna ceiste, spléachchártaí, díospóireacht, athbhreithniú, agus míniú seachas cóipeáil freagraí éighníomhach.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique, and exam planning, so students land in a more focused learning behavior.
entries.value: Tá inspir eagraithe timpeall ar mhodhanna foghlama amhail teagasc Sócraiteach, leideanna obair bhaile, tráthanna ceiste, spléachchártaí, céimeanna matamaitice, léirmheas scríbhneoireachta, agus pleanáil scrúduithe, ionas go dtagann daltaí i dtír in iompar foghlama níos dírithe.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes with specific teaching shapes: hints, Socratic questions, quizzes, active recall, role-play, debate, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: Tá inspir eagraithe timpeall ar mhóid foghlama le cruthanna teagaisc sonracha: leideanna, ceisteanna Sócraiteacha, tráth na gceist, aisghairm ghníomhach, rólghlacadh, díospóireacht, aiseolas scríbhneoireachta, agus pleanáil staidéir.

entries.source: inspir is organized into focused modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, source critique, and study planning.
entries.value: Tá inspir eagraithe ina mhodhanna dírithe amhail teagasc Sócraiteach, leideanna obair bhaile, tráthanna ceiste, spléachchártaí, aiseolas scríbhneoireachta, léirmheas foinsí, agus pleanáil staidéir.

entries.source: inspir makes learning modes public and indexable at /chat/{topicSlug}, letting learners land directly inside the right AI learning experience without needing a saved private chat.
entries.value: Déanann inspir modhanna foghlama poiblí agus innéacsaithe ag /chat/{topicSlug}, ag ligean d’fhoghlaimeoirí teacht díreach isteach sa taithí foghlama IS cheart gan comhrá príobháideach sábháilte a bheith de dhíth orthu.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around learning modes with specific teaching behavior: explanations, Socratic questions, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: Eagraíonn inspir IS timpeall ar mhodhanna foghlama le hiompar teagaisc sonrach: mínithe, ceisteanna Sócraiteacha, leideanna obair bhaile, tráthanna ceiste, spléachchártaí, díospóireacht, rólghlacadh, aiseolas scríbhneoireachta, agus pleanáil staidéir.

entries.value: conair imlonnaithe scoile inspir

entries.source: inspir separates public guest learning pages from private saved conversations, so learners, schools, search engines, and AI answer engines can understand what is meant to be public.
entries.value: Scarann inspir leathanaigh phoiblí foghlama d’aíonna ó chomhráite príobháideacha sábháilte, ionas gur féidir le foghlaimeoirí, scoileanna, innill chuardaigh, agus innill freagraí IS a thuiscint cad atá ceaptha a bheith poiblí.

entries.source: inspir started as a Facebook page publishing quizzes and building a habit of extracurricular learning.
entries.value: Thosaigh inspir mar leathanach Facebook a d’fhoilsigh tráthanna ceiste agus a thóg nós foghlama seach-churaclaim.

entries.source: inspir story reference links
entries.value: naisc thagartha scéil inspir

entries.source: inspir story timeline
entries.value: amlíne scéil inspir

entries.source: inspir supports search and AI retrieval for public learning pages. Training crawlers and private or operational surfaces are treated differently.
entries.value: Tacaíonn inspir le cuardach agus aisghabháil IS do leathanaigh phoiblí foghlama. Láimhseáiltear crawlers oiliúna agus dromchlaí príobháideacha nó oibríochtúla ar bhealach difriúil.

entries.source: inspir treats AI as an enabler, not the mission itself. The mission is better access to learning: clearer explanations, more practice, stronger curiosity, and a future where every child can reach a capable tutor for free or very low cost.
entries.value: Déileálann inspir le IS mar chumasóir, ní mar an misean féin. Is é an misean rochtain níos fearr ar fhoghlaim: mínithe níos soiléire, níos mó cleachtaidh, fiosracht níos láidre, agus todhchaí ina mbeidh gach páiste in ann teagascóir cumasach a bhaint amach saor in aisce nó ar chostas an-íseal.

entries.source: inspir trust principles
entries.value: prionsabail mhuiníne inspir

entries.source: inspir trust reference links
entries.value: naisc thagartha muiníne inspir

entries.source: inspir turns curiosity, homework, revision, and big questions into guided AI learning sessions that explain, ask back, and help you practise.
entries.value: Tiontaíonn inspir fiosracht, obair bhaile, athdhéanamh, agus ceisteanna móra ina seisiúin foghlama IS threoraithe a mhíníonn, a chuireann ceisteanna ar ais, agus a chuidíonn leat cleachtadh.

entries.source: Inspir wants to help in ensuring learning should be fun and for everyone. We strive for a day education reaches to everyone, everywhere through technology. Starting with the 1,415,422,077 in India.
entries.value: Ba mhaith le Inspir cabhrú lena chinntiú go mbeadh foghlaim spraíúil agus do chách. Déanaimid ár ndícheall lá a bhaint amach ina sroicheann oideachas gach duine, i ngach áit, trí theicneolaíocht. Ag tosú leis an 1,415,422,077 san India.

entries.source: inspir went live as a consumer-facing AI learning product within weeks of ChatGPT's public release.
entries.value: Chuaigh inspir beo mar tháirge foghlama IS do thomhaltóirí laistigh de chúpla seachtain ó scaoileadh poiblí ChatGPT.

entries.source: inspir works with schools to offer tailored AI chat experiences for students, built around confidentiality, curriculum needs, and the practical realities of school deployment.
entries.value: Oibríonn inspir le scoileanna chun taithí comhrá IS oiriúnaithe a thairiscint do dhaltaí, tógtha timpeall ar rúndacht, riachtanais churaclaim, agus réaltachtaí praiticiúla imlonnaithe scoile.

entries.source: inspir: You can Learn Anything
entries.value: inspir: Is Féidir Leat Rud Ar Bith a Fhoghlaim

entries.source: inspir.uk next-generation buildout
entries.value: tógáil chéad ghlúin eile inspir.uk

entries.source: inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed around that active recall loop: build a deck, try the front, reveal the answer, rate your recall, and review the misses until the idea sticks.
entries.value: Tá Flashcard Builder inspir deartha timpeall ar an lúb chuimhne ghníomhach sin: tóg deic, bain triail as an tosach, nocht an freagra, rátáil do chuimhne, agus athbhreithnigh na botúin go dtí go bhfanann an smaoineamh.

entries.source: inspir’s go-to-market grew from an existing offline network of schools and universities that had already engaged with extracurricular programmes and student events. That network helped inspir reach more than one million users across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: D’fhás dul-chuig-an-margadh inspir ó líonra as líne a bhí ann cheana de scoileanna agus ollscoileanna a raibh baint acu cheana le cláir sheach-churaclaim agus imeachtaí daltaí. Chabhraigh an líonra sin le inspir níos mó ná milliún úsáideoir a bhaint amach ar fud an ardáin shaor agus scoileanna comhpháirtíochta.

entries.source: inspir's mission is to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for everyone through free public AI learning tools.
entries.value: Is é misean inspir foghlaim a dhéanamh inrochtana, tarraingteach, taitneamhach, agus úsáideach do chách trí uirlisí foghlama IS poiblí saor in aisce.

entries.source: inspir's mission is to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: Is é misean inspir foghlaim a dhéanamh inrochtana, tarraingteach, taitneamhach, agus úsáideach trí uirlisí foghlama IS poiblí saor in aisce agus spásanna foghlama réidh don scoil.

entries.source: inspir's public modes let teachers evaluate the product through real learning flows before considering a school deployment or a tailored classroom pathway.
entries.value: Ligeann modhanna poiblí inspir do mhúinteoirí an táirge a mheas trí fhíorshreafaí foghlama sula smaoiníonn siad ar imlonnú scoile nó ar chonair sheomra ranga oiriúnaithe.

entries.source: inspir's work includes retrieval-based learning systems, NCERT content ingestion, structured prompting, custom LLM evaluation, and open-source engagement around RAG evaluation. The current platform lives at inspirlearning.com while the next generation is being built in public through inspir.uk and GitHub.
entries.value: Cuimsíonn obair inspir córais foghlama bunaithe ar aisghabháil, ionghabháil ábhair NCERT, prasáil struchtúrtha, meastóireacht saincheaptha LLM, agus rannpháirtíocht foinse oscailte timpeall ar mheasúnú RAG. Tá an t-ardán reatha ag inspirlearning.com agus tá an chéad ghlúin eile á tógáil go poiblí trí inspir.uk agus GitHub.

entries.source: Inspiring individuals to be creative and capable of withstanding the AI revolution is essential. Only by providing essential products and services for free to those who cannot afford them and sustaining access for those who can, can the world pursue happiness collectively.
entries.value: Tá sé riachtanach daoine aonair a spreagadh le bheith cruthaitheach agus in ann seasamh in aghaidh réabhlóid IS. Ní féidir leis an domhan sonas a lorg go comhchoiteann ach trí tháirgí agus seirbhísí riachtanacha a sholáthar saor in aisce dóibh siúd nach féidir leo iad a íoc agus trí rochtain a chothabháil dóibh siúd ar féidir leo.

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: In ionad freagra fada a chaitheamh isteach, cabhraíonn inspir leat bunús níos simplí, bealach níos doimhne, nó sampla praiticiúil a roghnú.

entries.source: Interactive Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Mód Foghlama IS Interactive Instruction chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: foghlaim trí dhéanamh, féachaint, comparáid, deisiú, agus máistreacht a chruthú. Tógann an aip canbhás ceachta beo timpeall ar do sprioc seachas teagasc a iompú ina chomhrá fada. Bain triail as: "Múin samhaltú airgeadais dom."

entries.source: Interview Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Mód Foghlama IS Interview Coach chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: ullmhaigh d’agallaimh scoile, intéirneachta, poist, nó scoláireachta le ceisteanna agus aiseolas réalaíoch.

entries.source: Journalists, directory editors, partners, schools, AI answer engines, and anyone writing about inspir can use it for facts, links, story angles, and citation-friendly references.
entries.value: Is féidir le hiriseoirí, eagarthóirí eolaire, comhpháirtithe, scoileanna, innill freagraí IS, agus aon duine atá ag scríobh faoi inspir é a úsáid le haghaidh fíricí, nasc, uillinneacha scéil, agus tagairtí cairdiúla don lua.

entries.source: Keep private saved conversations out of public discovery and citation surfaces.
entries.value: Coinnigh comhráite príobháideacha sábháilte amach as dromchlaí fionnachtana agus lua poiblí.

entries.source: Keep the learner focused, summarize progress, and suggest a break or review when the timer ends.
entries.value: Coinnigh an foghlaimeoir dírithe, achoimrigh dul chun cinn, agus mol sos nó athbhreithniú nuair a chríochnaíonn an t-amadóir.

entries.source: Khan Academy is built around a broad library of lessons, practice, standards-aligned content, and mastery support.
entries.value: Tá Khan Academy tógtha timpeall ar leabharlann leathan ceachtanna, cleachtaidh, ábhair ailínithe le caighdeáin, agus tacaíocht máistreachta.

entries.source: Khan Academy is excellent for structured lessons and practice. inspir is built for the moment a learner needs a live, promptable AI mode that can respond to their exact question, draft, problem, argument, or study plan.
entries.value: Tá Khan Academy ar fheabhas le haghaidh ceachtanna struchtúrtha agus cleachtaidh. Tá inspir tógtha don nóiméad ina dteastaíonn mód beo IS in-phrasáilte ó fhoghlaimeoir a fhéadfaidh freagairt dá cheist, dréacht, fadhb, argóint, nó plean staidéir chruinn.

entries.source: Khanmigo official page
entries.value: leathanach oifigiúil Khanmigo

entries.source: Know what to try next, why a step works, where the mistake happened, and how to revise the final answer in your own voice.
entries.value: Bíodh a fhios agat cad ba chóir a thriail ina dhiaidh sin, cén fáth a n-oibríonn céim, cá háit a tharla an botún, agus conas an freagra deiridh a athbhreithniú i do ghuth féin.

entries.source: Language Roleplay AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice a language in realistic scenarios like cafes, interviews, travel, and daily life, with corrections after each turn.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Mód Foghlama IS Language Roleplay chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: cleacht teanga i gcásanna réalaíocha cosúil le caiféanna, agallaimh, taisteal, agus saol laethúil, le ceartúcháin tar éis gach seala.

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor
entries.value: Foghlaim Rud ar Bith le Teagascóir IS Saor in Aisce

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Foghlaim Rud ar Bith le Teagascóir IS Saor in Aisce chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: fiosrach faoi rud ar bith ar fad? Fiafraigh, fiosraigh, agus téigh níos doimhne ar do luas féin. Déanann do chara smaointe praiticiúil, cuimhneach, agus éasca le tógáil orthu. Bain triail as: "Mínigh conas a oibríonn margadh na stoc i ndáiríre."

entries.source: Learn by doing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery with an AI tutor that turns your goal into an active lesson.

entries.source: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Foghlaim trí dhéanamh, féachaint, comparáid a dhéanamh, ceartú agus máistreacht a chruthú. Tógann an aip canbhás ceachta beo timpeall ar do sprioc seachas teagasc a iompú ina chomhrá fada. Bain triail as: "Múin samhaltú airgeadais dom."

entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag fiosrú ábhair phleanála agus ar mian leo treoir phraiticiúil seachas bosca freagraí ginearálta.

entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag fiosrú ábhair chleachtaidh agus ar mian leo treoir phraiticiúil seachas bosca freagraí ginearálta.

entries.source: Learners exploring stem topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag fiosrú ábhair STEM agus ar mian leo treoir phraiticiúil seachas bosca freagraí cineálach.

entries.source: Learners exploring thinking topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag fiosrú ábhair smaointeoireachta agus ar mian leo treoir phraiticiúil seachas bosca freagraí cineálach.

entries.source: Learners improving essays, presentations, messages, and public explanations.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag feabhsú aistí, cur i láthair, teachtaireachtaí, agus mínithe poiblí.

entries.source: Learners memorizing ordered ideas, vocabulary, speeches, formulas, or facts that need a stronger mental hook.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag cur smaointe ordaithe, stór focal, óráidí, foirmlí nó fíricí de ghlanmheabhair agus a dteastaíonn crúca meabhrach níos láidre uathu.

entries.source: Learners often search for prompts before they know which AI tool behavior they need. This page routes those searches into the right public learning mode.
entries.value: Is minic a chuardaíonn foghlaimeoirí prasaí sula mbíonn a fhios acu cén t-iompar uirlise IS atá de dhíth orthu. Treoraíonn an leathanach seo na cuardaigh sin isteach sa mhód foghlama poiblí ceart.

entries.source: Learners often search with a product they already know. The useful answer is not winner-take-all; it is which tool behavior fits the job.
entries.value: Is minic a chuardaíonn foghlaimeoirí le táirge atá ar eolas acu cheana. Ní freagra buaiteoir-tógann-gach-rud an freagra úsáideach; is é cén t-iompar uirlise a oireann don phost.

entries.source: Learners preparing essays, discussions, debates, interviews, or decisions.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag ullmhú aistí, plé, díospóireachtaí, agallaimh, nó cinntí.

entries.source: Learners preparing for tests or trying to remember ideas beyond the first explanation.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag ullmhú do thástálacha nó ag iarraidh smaointe a mheabhrú níos faide ná an chéad mhíniú.

entries.source: Learners preparing for tests who need to remember, practise, and repair weak spots.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag ullmhú do thástálacha agus a gcaithfidh cuimhneamh, cleachtadh, agus pointí laga a dheisiú.

entries.source: Learners who are staring at a new subject and need the first clear foothold.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag stánadh ar ábhar nua agus a bhfuil an chéad bhonn soiléir de dhíth orthu.

entries.source: Learners who do not just need one answer; they need a repeatable way to keep going.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí nach bhfuil freagra amháin amháin de dhíth orthu; teastaíonn bealach in-athúsáidte uathu chun leanúint ar aghaidh.

entries.source: Learners who feel stuck at the beginning of a new subject or need a simpler path into a difficult idea.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá i sáinn ag tús ábhair nua nó a dteastaíonn bealach níos simplí uathu isteach i smaoineamh deacair.

entries.source: Learners who forget after reading and need a practical review rhythm for concepts, terms, or exam material.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí a dhéanann dearmad tar éis léitheoireachta agus a dteastaíonn rithim phraiticiúil athbhreithnithe uathu do choincheapa, téarmaí nó ábhar scrúdaithe.

entries.source: Learners who have a specific question and need help now.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí a bhfuil ceist shonrach acu agus cabhair de dhíth orthu anois.

entries.source: Learners who have limited time, a large syllabus, and need a realistic way to review without pretending everything matters equally.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí a bhfuil am teoranta acu, siollabas mór acu, agus a dteastaíonn bealach réalaíoch uathu chun athbhreithniú a dhéanamh gan ligean orthu go bhfuil gach rud chomh tábhachtach céanna.

entries.source: Learners who remember ideas better through narrative, analogy, characters, and vivid examples.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí a chuimhníonn ar smaointe níos fearr trí insint, analógacht, carachtair agus samplaí beoga.

entries.source: Learners who understand better when they can step into a scene, role, or simulated context.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí a thuigeann níos fearr nuair is féidir leo céim isteach i radharc, ról, nó comhthéacs insamhlaithe.

entries.source: Learners who want a guided lesson canvas with examples, checks, and active practice instead of a long chat answer.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag iarraidh canbhás ceachta treoraithe le samplaí, seiceálacha agus cleachtadh gníomhach seachas freagra fada comhrá.

entries.source: Learners who want active recall, quick practice, and a score they can improve.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag iarraidh aisghairm ghníomhach, cleachtadh tapa, agus scór is féidir leo a fheabhsú.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag iarraidh cleachtadh díospóireachta bríomhar le guthanna cuimhneacha agus dúshlán cothrom.

entries.source: Learners who want sharper judgment instead of faster answer generation.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag iarraidh breithiúnas níos géire seachas giniúint freagraí níos tapúla.

entries.source: Learners who want to see why each math step works, not just copy an answer.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí ar mian leo a fheiceáil cén fáth a n-oibríonn gach céim mhata, seachas freagra a chóipeáil amháin.

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag iarraidh ábhar a chíoradh, toimhdí a thástáil, agus tuiscint bhuan a thógáil.

entries.source: Learners who want to understand people, choices, and ideas in historical context.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag iarraidh daoine, roghanna agus smaointe a thuiscint i gcomhthéacs stairiúil.

entries.source: Learners with a syllabus, a deadline, and a need to study what actually matters.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí le siollabas, spriocdháta, agus gá staidéar a dhéanamh ar a bhfuil tábhachtach i ndáiríre.

entries.source: Learners with limited time, large goals, or a syllabus that needs structure.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí le ham teoranta, spriocanna móra, nó siollabas a dteastaíonn struchtúr uaidh.

entries.source: Learners working through technical subjects where one unclear step can block the rest.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag obair trí ábhair theicniúla ina bhféadfadh céim doiléir amháin an chuid eile a bhlocáil.

entries.source: Learners writing essays, reading complex material, or trying to judge whether a claim is well supported.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag scríobh aistí, ag léamh ábhar casta, nó ag iarraidh breithiúnas a dhéanamh an bhfuil maíomh tacaithe go maith.

entries.source: Learners writing essays, stories, emails, scholarship notes, or arguments.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag scríobh aistí, scéalta, ríomhphoist, nótaí scoláireachta nó argóintí.

entries.source: Learners, parents, educators, and builders comparing AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí, tuismitheoirí, oideoirí, agus tógálaithe atá ag cur taithí teagaisc IS i gcomparáid.

entries.source: Learners, parents, educators, and builders evaluating AI tutors.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí, tuismitheoirí, oideoirí, agus tógálaithe atá ag measúnú teagascóirí IS.

entries.source: Learners, parents, teachers, schools, and self-taught builders
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí, tuismitheoirí, múinteoirí, scoileanna, agus tógálaithe féin-mhúinte

entries.source: Learners, writers, makers, and curious people who want ideas without losing direction.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí, scríbhneoirí, déantóirí, agus daoine fiosracha atá ag iarraidh smaointe gan treo a chailleadh.

entries.source: Learning Game Master AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Make learning feel like a game with quests, levels, points, challenges, and boss rounds.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Mód Foghlama IS Learning Game Master chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: cuir cuma cluiche ar an bhfoghlaim le rompu, leibhéil, pointí, dúshláin, agus babhtaí boss.
